speaker: Myramar
text: Telvar Orsson, every rank begins with discipline. Name the first band worn by a wizard accepted into Veneficturis.

speaker: Myramar
text: Choose carefully. The band is not ornament. It is a vow remembered by color.

choices.text: Red, called Rutilus, the entry rank.
Gold, the mark of a master of the Test of Fire.
Blue, the highest rank of the Veneficturis.

speaker: Myramar
text: Ambition is useful only after memory. The first band is Red: Rutilus. Say it again when you are ready.

speaker: Myramar
text: Correct. Red is the beginning, and beginnings bind more tightly than triumphs. Wear the band and remember who opened the gate.

speaker: Myramar
text: The Veneficturis records you as Red-rank. The city will teach you what that honor costs.
